nav.drawer.revision.label: Revision

nav.drawer.bookmarks.label: Bookmarks
nav.drawer.bookmarks.tip: I bookmark zawhna zawng zawng, thupui angin pawlin, chhiar leh emaw test leh emaw tur a inbuatsaih tawh.
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.label: Mistake Vault
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.tip: I sual zawhna zawng zawng hi, vawi hnih rual dik ni tawk chhan theih ni chin dah reng a ni.
nav.drawer.doubts.label: My Doubts
nav.drawer.doubts.tip: Chiang lo a ni ti a chhinchhiah i thil hriat leh zawhna hrilhfiahnate hi hetah hian tihfel rawh.

nav.drawer.addq.tip: Zirlaiten an practice tur Zawhna Set te ziah la, upload rawh.
nav.drawer.ikigai.label: Ikigai Compass
nav.drawer.ikigai.tip: I inbuatsaihna circle 4 nung reng. Passion, Profession, Mission leh Vocation te hi i practice zelin an inkaihhnawih zel.
nav.drawer.stats.label: Stats
nav.drawer.stats.tip: Accuracy, streak leh hmasawnna te, thupui tinin then chhuahsak.
nav.drawer.leaderboard.label: Leaderboard
nav.drawer.leaderboard.tip: I kar khat hian mi dangte nen engtin nge a inkhaikhin tih en rawh.
nav.drawer.weightage.label: Exam Pawimawhna

nav.drawer.weightage.tip: Subject tin engzat mark nge a nei tih. Mark a awmna hmun zir rawh.
nav.drawer.activityLog.label: Chhinchhiahna
nav.drawer.activityLog.tip: I level-up, streak milestone, thiam tak leh test i tih chhuahte, thar ber a hmasa tura pehna hun chhinchhiahna a ni.
nav.drawer.search.label: Zawn
nav.drawer.search.tip: Practice zawhna, concept card, lab value, dosage drill leh FAQ zawng zawng chu zawnna khat hian a hmuh theih.
nav.drawer.studyPlan.label: Zirna Ruahman
nav.drawer.studyPlan.sub: Ni, Nitin Ruahman leh Ni Tin Ruahman Bik
nav.drawer.studyPlan.tip: I NORCET ni leh nitin ruahman set la, exam ni thleng ni tin ruahman i a bik ber i dawng ang.
nav.drawer.reference.label: Reference
nav.drawer.reference.tip: Lab value, drug table leh clinical number en chin theih te a ni.
nav.drawer.premium.label: Premium
nav.drawer.premium.sub: Plan leh A Ṭha Zawnna En Hmasa
nav.drawer.premium.tip: Premium-a eng nge awm ang tih en rawh. Test hun chhung erawh chu engpawh free a ni.
nav.drawer.studyMethods.label: Zir Dan
nav.drawer.studyMethods.tip: Thu tak chungchang zir dante: active recall, spaced repetition leh he app hman ṭha dan.
nav.drawer.faq.label: FAQ
nav.drawer.support.label: Support
nav.drawer.support.tip: Help articles, quick answers, and how to reach a human. Works offline.
nav.drawer.faq.sub: Kan Team-in An Chhang Zawhna Te
nav.drawer.faq.tip: Team-in an chhang zawhna pungngai te hi a ni, nangmah zawhna dang pawh zawh thei che.
nav.drawer.about.label: Kan Chanchin
nav.drawer.about.tip: Kan mission, app hian engtin nge a zirtir leh tu nge siamtu tih chanchin.

nav.drawer.sendFeedback.tip: Bug i hmuh emaw, ngaihdan i nei em? Developer hnenah report ngeiin thawn rawh.
nav.drawer.myReports.label: Ka Feedback

nav.drawer.myReports.tip: I report tawhte leh admin chhanna te.
nav.drawer.settingsTip: Theme, sound, gesture, reminder, backup leh i profile te.
quiz.empty.bookmarks: I bookmark zawhna a awm hlei lo, practice chhungin ṭhenkhat bookmark la, kir leh ang che.
quiz.empty.reviewDue: Review tur eng pawh awm hlei lo, naktuk kir leh ang che.
quiz.empty.wrong: Review tur chhanna sual a awm lo.
quiz.empty.generic: Hetah entirtu eng pawh a awm lo.
quiz.coinsTip: Accuracy Coin, beisei mai ni lovin 'engvangin nge' tih zir zelin i chan
quiz.timerRemainingTip: Hun la awm tam: hun tawp deuh chuan chip a innawt fo fo ang
quiz.whyBonusBody: Mark i chang bakah engvangin nge tih pawh i hriat chian a. Chu chu clinical instinct dik tak a ni.
quiz.bookmarkedTip: Bookmark Tawh: Paih Chhuah Tur Tap Rawh
quiz.bookmarkTip: He zawhna hi Bookmarks-ah save la, hnu lamah review leh rawh
quiz.revealedBanner: Chhanna en tawh a ni: hei erawh hi i accuracy-ah chak lam emaw chhe lam emaw ah telh lo vang. I review queue-ah kan hruai leh ang, i hriat chiang theihna tur chuan.
quiz.flagTip: Chhinchhiah zawhna te chu Ka Rinhlelhna-ah save a ni, sidebar-ah hmuh theih.
quiz.flagged: Chhinchhiah Tawh: Hrilhfiahna Chiang Lo (paih tur tap rawh)
quiz.flagCta: Chiang Lo Nasa? He Hrilhfiahna Hi Chhinchhiah
quiz.reportErrorCta: Thil dik lo i hmu em? Report rawh, report tin mi pakhatin a check ziah.
home.caughtUpSub: Tunah Review Tur Eng Pawh Awm Lo
home.menuTip: App section zawng zawng: zirna, hmasawnna, hmanrua, zirna leh ṭanpuina te swipe emaw tap khat mai hian i hmuh thei ang. Home-ah, kawlvel lam ah swipe zawn chuan a hawng ang.
home.todayTip: I nitin thu tlangpui: revision tur eng nge awm, reminder, hlawhtlinna thar leh zirna hriatthiam dang te.
home.settingsTip: Account, theme, reminder, notification, sound, sidebar gesture, backup leh a dangte.
home.guestBody: I hmasawnna save tura, device tinah sync tura, leh leaderboard & library hawng tura sign in rawh.
home.waitlistTitle: Invite Mai Chauh Launch A Lo Thleng Dawn
home.waitlistBody: Waitlist-ah founding-member hmun bawm la, batch hmasa berte chuan engkim free an chang ang.
home.streakSavedBody: Naktuk hi i hre lo: i grace day-in a khang tawh. Streak nung reng tura tunah zir zel rawh.
home.whatsNewOne: "{name}" v{version} a update tawh: en tur tap rawh
home.whatsNewMany: Bank {n} update a ni tawh: en tur tap rawh
home.weakAreaTip: I accuracy a tlem ber thupui a ni. Tap chuan i thupui thatlo zawng zawng drill thei ang, i sual zawhna te hmasa berin a lo kal leh ang.
home.syllabusCoverageTip: Syllabus pum in eng zat nge i zir tawh tih a ni. Tap chuan thupui tin en dan hmuh thei ang: eng nge i tan tawh, eng nge i thiam tawh, leh eng nge i tan hlawm lo.
home.stats.question: zawhna
home.week.title: I Kar Khat · {range}
home.week.keepGoing: Zir zel rawh: nitin zawhna ṭhenkhat chhan la, i kar khat summary hawng theih tur chuan.
home.week.vsLastWeek: Kar zet nen khaikhin chuan Accuracy {pct}%
home.review.confirmTitle: I Review Test Ṭan Ang Em?
home.review.confirmBodyOne: Zawhna 1 chu spaced revision tur a ni tawh. I zir zelin instant feedback i dawng zel ang.
home.review.confirmBodyMany: Zawhna {n} chu spaced revision tur an ni tawh. I zir zelin instant feedback i dawng zel ang.
home.exam.setNewDate: Ni Thar Set Tur Tap Rawh
home.exam.examDayLuck: Exam Ni A Ni, Hlawhtling Rawh
home.drill.title: Drill Tests
home.drill.tip: I test mode zawng zawng hmun khatah: Quick, Topic Wise, Mock, Dosage leh Advanced, leh PYQ te.
home.drill.sub: Quick · Topic Wise · Mock · Advanced · Dosage · PYQ
home.learn.title: Thupui Angin Zir
home.learn.tip: Thupui tin zirtir Concept Card, i test hma ah material zir hmasa rawh.
home.learn.sub: Concept Cards · Test Hma Ah Zir
home.levelUp.title: Level Up
home.levelUp.tip: I hmasawnna hub a ni, clinical game leh Knowledge Map hi en la, XP chang, level chho la, prestige tier hawng rawh.
home.levelUp.sub: Clinical Games · Knowledge Map · XP Chang
home.notif.reviewBodyOne: Tunah zawhna 1 chu spaced revision tur a ni.
home.notif.reviewBodyMany: Tunah zawhna {n} chu spaced revision tur an ni.
home.notif.streakBody: Ni {s} rual in i zir zel tawh. Chutiang consistency chuan pass tuten leh pass lote hi a then chhuah ṭheuh.
home.notif.exam7: Hun tawp deuh a ni: i inbuatsaihna ring la, note pawimawh berte hnaih takin dah reng rawh.
home.notif.exam14: Kar hnih a la awm. I thatlo zawnate tihdik la, revision ah innghat zawk rawh.
home.notif.exam30: Thla khat aia tlem a la awm. Tunah revision fel taka i tih hian a hlawhtling ber ang.
home.notif.examDay: Exam Ni A Lo Thleng Tawh
home.notif.examOneDay: I Exam Thleng Ni 1 A La Awm
home.notif.examDays: I Exam Thleng Ni {n} A La Awm
home.notif.trendingUpBody: I accuracy chu {lastAcc}% aṭanga {thisAcc}% thleng a sang chho, kar tin. Eng pawh nge i danglamtir hi a hlawhtling tak zet.
home.notif.sharperBody: I {topic} accuracy chu kar zet aiin a lo ṭha lehzual tawh, hriat theih takin. Momentum ṭha tak.
home.notif.bankUpdatedMany: Zawhna bank {n} chu content thar nen update a ni tawh.
home.reply.fixed: I report chu tihdik a ni tawh: kan lawmthu!
home.reply.fixedOn: I report {id} chungchang chu tihdik a ni tawh: kan lawmthu!
home.reply.one: Admin pakhatin i feedback chu a chhang tawh.
home.reply.many: Admin pakhatin i report {n} chu a chhang tawh.
welcome.pitch.title: I NORCET Hlutna
welcome.pitch.sub: PDF dang aia hei hi a ṭha zawk chhan, second 60 chhunga hrilhfiah.
welcome.pitch.p1Title: Aspirant Tam Zawk PDF-in An Tikawlh
welcome.pitch.p1Body: Note tawp nei lo, an dinhmun dik takzet leh eng an tihdik hmasa tur pawh an hriat lo.
welcome.pitch.p2Title: He App Hian Inbuatsaihna A Fel Zel
welcome.pitch.p2Body: Spaced revision, thatlo zawn en, exam dik taka hun ruahman leh i syllabus map chiang tak.
welcome.pitch.p3Title: Exam Ni Ang Famkim Tura Siam
welcome.pitch.p3Body: Negative marking, section tin hun ruahman leh topper benchmark, CBT dik tak i hriat ṭhin ang.
welcome.lib.title: Library Aṭangin Ṭan
welcome.lib.sub: Eng hun pawh sidebar menu-ah hmuh theih.
welcome.lib.r1Title: Library Chuan Zawhna Bank A Awm
welcome.lib.r1Body: Thupui leh source angin pawl Zawhna Set ruahmanna, i practice pool a lungrual ber a ni.
welcome.lib.r2Body: Bank belh chuan a zawhnate chu i test, stats leh revision-ah a tel tawh, hnu lamah offline pawh a hin thei ang.
welcome.lib.r3Title: A Ni Lo Chuan Nangmah Siam
welcome.lib.r3Body: I mamawh tak drill nan zawhna set custom siam thei (Zawhna Belh / Library).
welcome.demo.genderTitle: I Dinhmun Chu Eng Nge Ni?
welcome.demo.genderTrust: AIIMS chuan gender quota 80:20 a hman fel tak zet. Hei hi i simulated leaderboard rank i pool chhungah calibrate nan kan hman mai a, content bihchian nan erawh ni lo veve.
welcome.demo.qualTitle: I Qualification A Sang Ber Chu Eng Nge?
welcome.demo.qualTrust: Hei hian i training tur example kan siam theih nan a ṭanpui. GNM nurse te chuan bedside-to-theory drill an dawng ang.
welcome.demo.empTitle: I Ni Tin Hin Dan Ah Engtin Nge Inbuatsaihna A Rem?
welcome.demo.empTrust: I dashboard kan rem tir ang. Nurse hna thawktu chuan Tuesday chhun hunnawm 3 mock a thawh theih lo ngei ngei.
welcome.demo.windowTitle: Eng Hun Nge I Zir Ṭha Ber?
welcome.demo.windowTrust: I nitin nudge hun hi he window ang hian kan ruahman ang, i awlsam takzet huna reminder chu i ngaihthah ang aia a ṭha zawk. Eng hun pawh danglamtir theih.
welcome.demo.privacyNote: Duh anga tih leh private · eng hun pawh Settings → Profile-ah danglamtir theih.
welcome.demo.contentNote: Zawhna tin mihringin an ziak a, an check bawk. Thil dik lo i hmuh chuan tap khatah report rawh.
welcome.ikigai.title: I Chhan Engnge Ni?
welcome.ikigai.bodyPost: : Nursing Officer i nih duh chhan thuk zawk. Engnge hei hi engkim a hlu tihna?
welcome.ikigai.placeholder: Ka nu leh pa tur in lei tur. Ka tih theih ka entirna tur. Ka khua leh tui rawngbawlna tur.
welcome.ikigai.private: Private a ni. Nangmah chauhin i en thei ang.
welcome.ikigai.return: I ni harsa ber apiangah, NurseHolic-in hei hi i thu ngeiin a lo hruai leh ang che.
welcome.tips.title: Tip Rang Pathum
welcome.tips.sub: App hi nangmah ang taka siamtu thil tete.
welcome.tips.t1Body: Home screen, menu emaw settings-ah emaw, card neh la vawn zawtin a hin dan hrilhfiahna rang en thei ang, hawng lo chungin.
welcome.tips.t2Body: Home screen-ah, hmun eng pawhah swipe kawlvel lam chuan menu a hawng ang, swipe ding lam chuan a khaih ang. Phone, tablet leh iPhone-ah a inang vek ang.
welcome.tips.t3Body: Section engpahah heart tap rawh. Stats, drill mode, leaderboard, pin tur chuan. I duh tak te chu home screen-ah tap khatin i hmuh thei ang.
welcome.tour.title: A Chhunga Awmte Hi A Ni
welcome.tour.sub: Section engpahah tap la a hin dan en la, tel ta rawh. Settings-ah hian hi i hawng leh thei bawk ang.
welcome.popup.sub: I Tel Hma Ah En Rang
welcome.leave.title: Tour I Kalsan Ang Em?
welcome.leave.body: Eng hun pawh Settings → Show welcome tour aṭangin i hawng leh thei ang.
welcome.rows.kmap.title: Knowledge Map
welcome.rows.kmap.desc: I syllabus chu arsi pawl ang, practice zelin arsi tin i var tir thei ang.
welcome.rows.drill.title: Drill Tests
welcome.rows.drill.desc: Test mode 6 zawng zawng, warm-up rang aṭanga exam simulation famkim thleng, hmun khatah.
welcome.rows.learn.title: Thupui Angin Zir
welcome.rows.learn.desc: Video ngak mai ni lovin, Concept Card tete.
welcome.rows.methods.title: Zir Dan
welcome.rows.methods.desc: Science-in a nghawngtir zir dan 6 leh hetah engtin nge hman hrilhfiahna.
welcome.rows.revision.title: Revision Sheet
welcome.rows.revision.desc: I Bookmark te print theih phek khatah tlangpui.
welcome.rows.doubts.title: My Doubts
welcome.rows.doubts.desc: I zir laiin chiang lo eng pawh chhinchhiah la, hmun khatah tihfel vek rawh.
welcome.rows.library.title: Question Bank Library
welcome.rows.library.desc: Shared bank te en la, zawhna import rawh.
auth.createSub: Device tinah i hmasawnna save tur profile siam rawh
auth.googleSignedPre: Google Hmangin Sign In, I Ni:
auth.googleSignedPost: : zo tur chuan hnuaia display name thlang rawh.
auth.recovery.identify: I display name ziah rawh. Nangmah dik tak i nih entirna tur security question kan lantir ang.
auth.recovery.dob: He profile i siam laia i dah date of birth ziah la, password thar thlang rawh.
auth.recovery.question: I security question chhang la, password thar thlang rawh.
auth.recovery.success: Password reset a ni tawh. Password thar hmangin log in rawh, kan fill tawh che.
auth.nameTaken: He hming hi mi dangin an la hmang tawh.
auth.logInInstead: Log In Ni Lehzawk Ang Em?
auth.emojiCaution: Emoji leh symbol chu leaderboard emaw backup emawah dik takin a lang lo thei. Letter, number leh space hman chu a him zawk.
auth.answerHelp: Password i theihnghilh chuan hei hi i recovery-ah i hman ang. Case-sensitive a ni lo.
auth.emailConfirmedGoogle: I Google account-in a confirm tawh.
auth.emailHelp: Username emaw email emawin log in theih tur leh i account recovery-ah a ṭanpui che ang.
auth.ph.chooseNewPwd: Password thar thlang (a tlem ber character 8)
auth.warn.google: I Google account-in he profile hi a vengtu ang, hriatreng tur password dang a ngai lo.
auth.warn.create: I display name leh password hriat reng rawh. Log in tura pahnih zawng i mamawh vek ang. Theihnghilh chuan security question hi access recovery dan awm chhun a ni.
auth.warn.login: Hei hi zirna app a ni, account him tak a ni lo. Hmun dangah i hman tawh password i hman leh suh.
auth.legacy.title: I Device-a Hmasawnna Awm Tawh He Profile-ah Puitling
auth.hint.google: Profile chu device tinah sync a ni. I Google account-in sign in a awm reng tir ang, password a ngai lo.
auth.hint.create: Profile chu device tinah sync a ni. I display name leh password, i security answer pawh hre reng rawh.
auth.hint.login: Password i theihnghilh em? Chunga link hi hman rawh. I security question hmangin reset thei ang.
auth.link.title: I Profile Kan Hmuh
auth.link.body1: hi profile chungah a awm tawh
auth.link.body2: Google connect tura chu profile password vawi khat ziah rawh, hnu lamah tap khatin sign in i thei tawh ang.
auth.err.notStaff: He Google account hi staff account nen link a ni lo. Username & password hmangin sign in rawh, a ni lo chuan main app aṭangin Google link hmasa rawh.
auth.err.linkFailed: I Google Account Link Theih Lo
auth.err.noRecoverable: Chutiang hming nen recover theih profile kan hmuh lo. Spelling enfiah leh la, a ni lo chuan profile thar siam rawh.
auth.err.pickDob: I Date of Birth Thlang Rawh
auth.err.typeAnswer: I Security Question Chhanna Ziah Rawh
auth.err.profanity: Chu display name hian mipuiah kan entirtu theih lo thu a keng, dang thlang rawh.
settings.guest.tip: Tunah guest i ni a, i hmasawnna hi he device hian a awm mai. Backup leh phone tinah sync tur chuan profile free siam rawh.
settings.guest.sub: Guest I Ni: I Hmasawnna Save La Device Tinah Sync
settings.profile.rowTip: I hming thlak, he device-a profile dang switch, i data backup, a ni lo chuan he profile reset, hetiang zawng zawng hi phek khatah.
settings.profile.tapToRename: Hming Thlak Tur Tap · Device Tinah Sync
settings.profile.loggedIn: Log In Tawh · Device Tinah Sync
settings.profile.syncedLead: Backup leh sync a ni tawh.
settings.profile.syncedBody: I hmasawnna hi i account-ah save a ni. Phone emaw laptop thar emawah, hming leh password inang mai hmangin sign in la, engkim auto-in a lo kir leh ang.
settings.switch.confirmBody: Profile dangah i pui ang. I hmasawnna tunlai chu save a ni tawh.
settings.logout.confirmTitle: He Profile Log Out Ang Em?
settings.logout.confirmBody: I hmasawnna save a ni a, eng hun pawh i log in leh thei ang. Eng pawh delete a ni lo.
settings.reset.confirmTitle: He Profile Data Reset Ang Em?
settings.reset.confirmBody: Hei hian he profile hmasawnna, bookmark, stats leh zawhna custom te chu permanent-in a delete vek ang. Profile dangte chu a khaikhin lo vang. Hei hi undo theih a ni lo, backup download hmasak ngun rawh (Settings → Backup).
settings.reset.rowSub: Hmasawnna, bookmark, stats leh zawhna custom permanent-in a delete
settings.gestures.intro: Sidebar hawng leh khaih dan thlang rawh. Backdrop tap-a khaih chu awm reng tur a ni.
settings.gestures.closeOn: Sidebar a hawng laiin hmun eng pawhah swipe ding lam chuan a khaih ang
settings.gestures.closeOff: Off: backdrop emaw menu icon emaw tap hian i khaih thei zel ang
settings.gestures.openSub: Home screen-a hmun eng pawhah swipe kawlvel lam chuan sidebar a hawng ang, phone, tablet leh iOS-ah.
settings.gestures.rowSub: Sidebar Hawng Emaw Khaih Emaw Tur Swipe
settings.gestures.rowTip: Sidebar hawng leh khaih dan thlang rawh, Home-a swipe kawlvel lam chuan a hawng, swipe ding lam chuan a khaih. Backdrop tap chuan a khaih fo fo ang.
settings.sync.signInCta: Cloud Backup On Tur Sign In
settings.sync.backUpNowSub: I hmasawnna tunlai ber cloud-ah tunah push
settings.sync.msgOk: Tunah hian cloud-ah backup a ni tawh.
settings.sync.msgOffline: Tunah cloud thleng theih lo. I hmasawnna hi he device-ah a him a, online i lo nih hunah auto-in backup a ni leh ang.
settings.sync.msgFailed: Backup a kal chhuak lo, i connection enfiah la, tih leh rawh.
settings.sync.footer: Backup hi auto a ni: i thil tih zawng zawng, Knowledge-Map note pawh telin, cloud-ah a inn save mai. Download tur emaw chhia thei tur file a awm lo. Phone thar-ah pui tur chuan app install la, sign in mai rawh.
settings.sync.rowSub: I Hmasawnna Auto-in Backup A Ni
settings.sync.rowTip: I cloud-backup status en la, i duh chho hunah backup thei. I hmasawnna, Knowledge-Map note telin, auto-in sync a nih avangin, device eng pawha sign in hian a kir leh ang. Download tur file a awm lo.
settings.share.title: NurseHolic Share
settings.share.tip: I personal invite, link, QR leh tap khata WhatsApp message. Chutianga lo tel ṭhiante chu i leaderboard-ah an lang ang.
settings.share.sub: I Personal Invite Link, QR Code & WhatsApp Share
settings.spaced.tip: Spaced repetition hi hriatreng rei tak tur atan a pawimawh ber. Hei hian thupui tinin a review a ngai hun takah 'Review due' card Home-ah a lantir ang.
settings.spaced.title: Spaced Revision Reminder
settings.spaced.on: Zawhna review tur an inbuatsaih tih hunah Home-a 'Review due' card hring lan
settings.spaced.off: Chhun a ni: spaced-repetition engine chuan ni a track chho zel, i nudge a tih chuang lo mai
settings.notif.tip: Switch khatin engkim: i time thlang chhungin i zir loh a nih chuan nudge nem tak leh zawhna set thar chhuah huna ping. Hnuaiah pahnih zawng fine-tune thei.
settings.notif.iosIntro: iPhone-ten chuan install app aṭanga notification mai an phal. Install hmasak rawh: second 10 mai a ngai:
settings.notif.iosStep2Post: , app hawng la, he switch hi hmang
settings.notif.offSub: Tap khat: nitin zirna nudge + zawhna thar chhuah huna ping
settings.notif.nudgeTimeSub: Chu hun thleng i zir loh a nih chauhin a fire
settings.notif.contentOn: Team-in zawhna set thar an belh huna ping
settings.notif.contentOff: Off: zawhna set thar chungchang ping a awm lo
settings.notif.blocked: He app tan notification block a ni. On tur chuan, i browser settings-ah he site notification phal la, tih leh rawh.
settings.notif.unsupported: He browser hian notification a support lo. App hi i home screen-ah install tum rawh.
settings.install.title: App Install
settings.install.sub: Full screen, offline-a hin thei, i home screen-a tap khatin hin
settings.gk.tip: GK leh Aptitude chu NORCET nursing core kaihhnawih a ni lo, chuvangin default-ah i accuracy leh thatlo zawnaah an telh lo. Duh takin i drill chauh emaw on rawh.
settings.gk.title: Stats-ah GK & Aptitude Telh
settings.gk.on: General Knowledge leh Reasoning & Aptitude te chu i accuracy, coverage leh thatlo zawnaah an telh
settings.gk.off: Off: nursing thupui te chauh chuan accuracy, coverage leh thatlo zawnaah an telh (recommend)
settings.sound.title: Pull-to-refresh Sound
settings.sound.tip: Pull down-a refresh huna sound nem tak. Cosmetic mai a ni: thip taka refresh tur chuan off rawh.
settings.sound.on: Pull down-a refresh huna sound nem tak a lang
settings.themes.title: Theme
settings.themes.tip: Light leh dark inkarah switch la, app pumin tur accent colour palette thlang rawh.
settings.help.tourSub: Mode tinin a hin dan tlangpui rang
settings.fav.title: Favourites
settings.fav.orderSub: Favourites-ah an lan dan kalhna siam rawh
settings.crib.title: Test Hnua Crib Sheet Lantir
settings.crib.on: Test tin hnuah zawhna dik, sual leh hre lo review
settings.crib.off: Crib Sheet a chhun, test hnuah results screen mai a lang
settings.crib.footer: Crib Sheet hian zawhna zawng zawng chu chhanna dik leh hrilhfiahna nen a lantir. PYQ booklet ang bawk. Share thei bawk.
settings.legal.privacySub: Eng nge kan store leh engtin nge kan hman
settings.legal.guidelinesSub: FAQ thread leh leaderboard kan friendly tih chhun dan
settings.legal.refundsSub: Paid plan hin dan (tunah engkim free a ni)
settings.legal.disclaimerSub: Kan content chu eng nge ni, eng nge ni lo, leh thil dik lo siam that dan
settings.legal.rowTip: Privacy Policy leh Terms of Use chhiar rawh. Eng nge store a ni, engtin nge hman a ni, leh app rule awlsam te.
settings.legal.rowSub: Privacy Policy leh Terms of Use
settings.support.title: NurseHolic Free Awm Reng Tirtu
settings.support.sub: Free leh Ad-free · server cost ṭanpuina tur chai lei min tur
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.rowTip: Button, menu leh instruction language danglamtir. Zawhna leh zirna content chu English-ah a awm zel ang, NORCET exam dik tak angin.
settings.language.subtitle: Hei hian app button, menu leh instruction a danglamtir ang. Zawhna, hrilhfiahna leh zirna content erawh English-ah a awm zel dawn, a chhan chu NORCET hi English-a hin a nih avangin, exam ngei language-in i practice theih nan.
settings.language.storageWarning: I device storage a khat dawn tawh. Space i chhuahsak hma loh chuan he language hi offline-ah a awm reng lo thei.
settings.language.downloadFailed: He language download theih lo. I connection enfiah la, tih leh rawh.
settings.language.draftNotice: Translation te hi draft tirh a la ni a, feedback nen a ṭha lehzual zel ang. I language-a thu inzirh a sual chuan, Report button hmangin min hrilh rawh.
auth.consent.ack: NurseHolic hi exam inbuatsaihna atana zirlai tool a ni a, clinical kaihhruaina hnar a ni lo tih ka hria a, ka pawm bawk:
auth.consent.nudge: Profile siam turin a chunga box kha tick rawh.
welcome.consentPre: I kal zel chuan i pawm a ni kan
welcome.consentEdu: NurseHolic hi exam inbuatsaihna study tool a ni a, clinical kaihhruaina a ni lo.
home.legalUpdated.title: Kan thuthlung te update a ni
home.legalUpdated.body: Kan legal page te kan siamthat a. En ve rawh.
common.eduTag: Zirna atan chauh. Clinical thutlukna atan a ni lo.
nav.drawer.assistant.label: I thianpa hnenah zawt rawh
nav.drawer.assistant.sub: App engtin nge a kal tih chat ah zawt rawh
nav.drawer.assistant.tip: Test, streak, sync leh feature tinreng chhanna chat ah nghal.
settings.install.iosHow: Browser bar ah Share chu tap la, tichuan Add to Home Screen thlang rawh.
settings.install.andHow: Browser menu chu hawng la, tichuan Install app (a nih loh leh Add to Home screen) tap rawh.
settings.install.deskHow: Chrome emaw Edge ah, address bar-a install icon emaw browser menu hmang rawh. Desktop browser dang ah install nan, nurseholic.in chu i phone ah hawng rawh.
home.calc.title: Nursing Calculator Suite
home.calc.tip: Dose, drip rate, BMI, GCS, nau pian hun leh a dang tam tak. Offline chhungin a chhut vek a, a hman formula pawh a târ lang zêl.
nav.drawer.nursingCalc.label: Nursing Calc
nav.drawer.nursingCalc.tip: Dose, drip rate, BMI, GCS, nau pian hun leh a dang tam tak. Chhanna tin nen formula a târ lang.
